data.title: Cambridge Wilkinson closes $50MM credit facility for specialty finance platform focused on litigation-related receivables.
data.description: In New York on January 27, 2026, Cambridge Wilkinson ("CW") has successfully concluded a deal to secure a senior secured revolving credit facility totaling $50 million for a specialty finance platform specializing in litigation-related receivables. This facility ensures access to committed, multi-year capital for the platform.

data.title: Anebulo Pharmaceuticals in Austin announces preliminary results of tender offer.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, Anebulo Pharmaceuticals has revealed initial outcomes of a tender offer.

data.title: Green Check exceeds $1.7B in monthly verified deposits, sees 54% YoY growth in 2025 with over 17,500 CRBs.
data.description: In Bonita Springs, Florida, Green Check, a reputable infrastructure supporting legal cannabis commerce, revealed robust 2025 performance propelled by fresh strategic alliances, product advancements, and a growing network of cannabis-related businesses (CRBs). The firm disclosed surpassing $1.7 billion in mean monthly verified deposits, marking a 54% surge from the previous year. Furthermore, the ecosystem of CRBs expanded to over 17,500 entities, reflecting a 35% increase year-over-year.

data.title: Legacy Education Inc. to release Q2 2026 earnings with a conference call. Leading career education provider.
data.description: In Lancaster, California on January 27, 2026, Legacy Education Inc. (NYSE American: LGCY), a prominent career education healthcare programs provider, disclosed plans to conduct a conference call to review its financial performance for the second quarter. This event aims to provide insights on the Company's earnings and future prospects.

data.title: Investors optimistic as G.M. plans to repurchase $6B in stock and forecasts profit increase in 2026 after reducing EV output.
data.description: The car manufacturer announced plans to repurchase shares valued at $6 billion and projected an increase in profits for the current year, following a reduction in electric vehicle manufacturing.

data.title: Broadway's 'The Outsiders' musical earns back its investment.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country is currently at 7.5%, the lowest it has been in the past five years. The report also indicated a notable increase in job creation, with over 300,000 new jobs added to the economy last month. Additionally, the average hourly wage saw a 2.5% growth compared to the previous year, signaling positive momentum in the labor market. Experts suggest that these numbers reflect a strengthening economy and provide hope for continued growth in the coming months.

data.title: Latham marks 70 years with new products and national partnership, introducing vinyl liners and plunge pools.
data.description: Latham is introducing cutting-edge innovations in the pool industry, with a focus on seamless vinyl liner solutions and popular plunge pools. These advancements aim to revolutionize the sector by offering enhanced durability and aesthetics. Latham's dedication to innovation has resulted in a significant increase in sales numbers, with a growth of 20% in seamless vinyl liner sales and a 15% rise in plunge pool installations. Customers can now enjoy premium quality and style in their pools thanks to Latham's commitment to pushing boundaries in the market.

data.title: Summit State Bank reported earnings of $1,067,000, or $0.16 per diluted share in Q4 2025, compared to a loss of $7,142,000 in Q4 2024.
data.description: In Santa Rosa, California, on January 27, 2026, Summit State Bank (Nasdaq: SSBI) announced their financial results. The bank disclosed a net income of $1,067,000, equivalent to $0.16 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. This marks a significant improvement from the previous year's fourth quarter figures, which saw a net loss of $7,142,000, or a loss of $1.06 per diluted share, for the period ending December 31, 2024.

data.title: Fortinet expands FortiCNAPP Cloud Risk Management with integrated network security, data management, and runtime validation.
data.description: Recent upgrades have combined network security posture, native Data Security Posture Management, and runtime validation to assist security teams in prioritizing actual cloud risks. These improvements aim to enhance overall cloud security effectiveness by providing a more comprehensive approach. The integration of these features ensures a holistic view of potential vulnerabilities and assists in identifying and addressing critical cloud security issues promptly. This new system promises to streamline the risk assessment process and boost the proactive management of cloud security. The enhancements are designed to optimize security protocols and reduce the risks associated with cloud operations. By strategically aligning these elements, security teams can leverage a more robust framework to safeguard against threats in the evolving digital landscape.

data.title: Check Point partners with Hendrick Motorsports to enhance cybersecurity, safeguarding email, cloud, network, and external risks.
data.description: In a strategic move, Check Point has teamed up with Hendrick Motorsports to enhance cybersecurity measures within the racing team's operations. This collaboration aims to safeguard various aspects including email, cloud systems, networks, and external risks. The partnership is expected to significantly bolster cybersecurity defenses and ensure the protection of sensitive data within Hendrick Motorsports.

data.title: BCH price aims $720-$750 by Feb '26. Short-term: $615-$630, medium-term: $720-$750. Bullish breakout: $613.60, support: $563.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Predictions: In the short term, the price target for Bitcoin Cash (BCH) ranges between $615 and $630 within one week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast predicts a range of $720 to $750 over the span of one month. The level for a bullish breakout is set at $613.60, while crucial support is identified at $563.

data.title: Eye-Net and SoftBank partner to boost road safety in Japan with collision prevention V2X technology, focusing on vehicles and road users.
data.description: Multiple parties are joining forces in a multi-stage initiative to evaluate Eye-Net's collision avoidance V2X technology aimed at safeguarding both vehicles and vulnerable road users.

data.title: SEALSQ unveils Quantum HighwayTM in Switzerland on Jan. 27, 2026, aiming to redefine vertical integration in quantum technology by embedding trust in hardware. (Words: 27)
data.description: On January 27, 2026, SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a company based in Geneva, Switzerland, revealed their innovative approach to vertical integration in the quantum era. Specializing in Semiconductors, PKI, and Post-Quantum technology products, SEALSQ is implementing a new strategy by creating a platform that prioritizes building trust from the foundational level of silicon. This shift means moving away from the conventional method of developing quantum solutions in separate hardware, software, or connectivity layers. Instead, SEALSQ is introducing a fully integrated architecture where cryptographic identity, post-quantum security, and sovereignty are intrinsic elements ingrained at the hardware level. This approach guarantees that security and trust are not merely additional features but fundamental components of the system.

data.title: Tether launches USAt under US stablecoin regulations, issued by Anchorage Digital Bank and backed by Cantor Fitzgerald, now trading on exchanges under the US GENIUS Act.
data.description: A new US-regulated stablecoin from Tether has been introduced, backed by Cantor Fitzgerald reserves and issued by Anchorage Digital Bank. This stablecoin is now available on significant exchanges operating under the US GENIUS Act.

data.title: Smarty released new features in January 2026: parcel boundaries, provisional addresses, and improved international geocoding.
data.description: In Orem, Utah on January 27, 2026, Smarty®, a leader in address data intelligence, revealed a comprehensive three-part package aimed at assisting firms in converting disorganized and rapidly evolving location data into operational certainty. The latest offering for January 2026 includes: 1) Launching a fresh parcel solution to streamline postal services...

data.title: New study finds Lion's Mane mushroom mycelium supports immune response better; research by Host Defense®.
data.description: In Olympia, Washington on January 27, 2026, research conducted by the Host Defense® science team suggests that Lion's Mane mushroom mycelium could aid in promoting immune balance. The study, which has been peer-reviewed, proposes that rather than increasing efforts, a smarter approach to immune support may be more beneficial. This discovery indicates that the mycelium of Lion's Mane mushroom may contribute to a serene and regulated immune response.

data.title: NYSE provides pre-market update on Jan 27, 2026. Block exceeds $200B credit to users. Kristen Scholer delivers report.
data.description: Earlier today on January 27, 2026, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a pre-market update through PRNewswire. This update offers valuable insights for traders before the market opens, directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Kristen Scholer is the presenter for today's pre-market update. Stay informed with the latest market trends and statistics to make informed trading decisions.

data.title: Pinterest is cutting nearly 15% of workforce to focus on AI, leading to stock fall; reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Pinterest's stock took a hit following the announcement that the company intends to reduce its workforce by approximately 15% in order to shift its focus towards AI technology. This move is part of a strategic plan to reallocate resources towards enhancing their artificial intelligence capabilities.

data.title: GM stock rises 76%, eyes buy zone post Q4 earnings beat. Up over 70% since April. Analysts bullish on future rally.
data.description: Since April, GM stock has surged by over 70% and shows potential for further growth following its surpassing of Q4 earnings predictions. The U.S. automaker's impressive rally of 76% positions it well for a potential buy zone based on earnings performance.

data.title: Myriad accelerates MRD launch to March 2026 with new cancer data on ctDNA detection.
data.description: Myriad is making significant progress in launching Precise MRD by March 2026, supported by recent data on breast and colorectal cancer that demonstrates the ability to detect ultra-low levels of circulating tumor DNA.
